meaning: adj.熟练的,拿手的;n.老手,擅长者
examples: As a composer he proved himself adept at large dramatic forms.
He's usually very adept at keeping his private life out of the media.
She is an adept rock-climber and a past master of the obstacle course.
Society does much better when pinheads are made by folks actually adept at making pinheads.
Garcia has been especially adept at feathering his own nest with Ugly Duckling's assets.
